title: SubmitInput
description: Main-surface input envelope for the submit primitive. No ministry / service / transaction-category fields — adapters own typed params per FR-002/FR-003.

tool_id.description: Globally unique adapter id registered in the tool registry. Collisions rejected at boot (FR-020).

params.description: Opaque adapter-specific parameters. Adapter validates against its own Pydantic model at invocation time. Main envelope does NOT narrow this shape (harness-not-reimplementation).
